---
title: "generate_fishtest_N1000.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\integration\generate_fishtest_N1000.py"
loc: 146
complexity: 12
logic_score: 2.00
style_score: 3.80
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 1.57
---

## Intent
The `generate_fishtest_N1000.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on generate_n1000. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via generate_n1000. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [random](file://random)

### Exports
- `generate_n1000`
